summary: Comprehensive testing of CTF writeup blog completed successfully. Backend APIs working excellently (92.6% success rate) with all core functionality operational. Frontend beautifully designed with cyberpunk theme and all user flows working properly. Authentication, writeup management, and integration between frontend/backend working perfectly.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of expected 401 for unauthorized requests
minor_issues.impact: Minor - both status codes indicate authentication failure correctly
